title: CrystalPerSec
description: Tracks how many End Crystals you hit per second in crystal PvP.
body:
## Crystal Per Second

**Take your PvP performance to the next level with the Crystal CPS — a lightweight and fully customizable mod that tracks how many crystals you place per second in real time.**

### Features:
- Real-Time Crystal CPS
 Instantly see how many crystals you're placing per second with a clean, responsive on-screen  display.
 
- Customizable Screen Position
 Move the counter anywhere on your screen to perfectly match your HUD layout.
 
- Adjustable CPS Tiers & Colors
 Personalize how the counter reacts to your performance:
 
- Set custom CPS thresholds (tiers).
 Assign different colors for each tier.
 Example:
 0–2 CPS → Green
 3–5 CPS → Yellow
 6+ CPS → Red
 (Fully configurable to match your preferences!)
- Lightweight & Performance-Friendly
Designed to run smoothly without affecting your FPS.
